name: FortiGate Virus Attack
description: Detects virus attacks identified by FortiGate's antivirus engine.

prompts.prompt: Critical FortiGate alert: A virus attack has been detected by the antivirus engine. This indicates a severe threat to the network. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Log ID** {log_id}, **User** {user}, **Source Address** {source_address}, **Destination Address** {destination_address}, **Source Country** {source_country}, **Destination Country** {destination_country}, **Infected File Name** {file_name}, **Virus Name** {virus_name}, **Severity** {severity}. Investigate this critical event immediately to contain the infection and mitigate its impact.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the virus detection event.

parameters.name: log_id
parameters.description: The FortiGate Log ID for the virus event.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user associated with the virus detection, if applicable.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address from which the virus traffic originated.

parameters.name: destination_address
parameters.description: The destination IP address where the virus traffic was directed.

parameters.name: source_country
parameters.description: The country of origin for the source IP (enriched via GeoIP).

parameters.name: destination_country
parameters.description: The country of the destination IP (enriched via GeoIP).

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: The name of the file identified as infected.

parameters.name: virus_name
parameters.description: The name of the detected virus signature.

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: The severity level reported by FortiGate for the virus detection.
